zh.lifeSummary: 當John Wrenbury於1292年出生在英國英格蘭爾萊波瑞時，他的父親John Wrenbury20歲，母親Emma23歲。他於大約1317年與Johanna de Wrenbury在英國英格蘭爾萊波瑞結婚。他們至少是3個女兒的父母。他去世於1349年在英國爾諾維其享年57歲，埋葬在英國爾諾維其。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当John Wrenbury于1292年出生在英国英格兰爾萊波瑞时，他的父亲John Wrenbury20岁，母亲Emma23岁。他于大约1317年与Johanna de Wrenbury在英国英格兰爾萊波瑞结婚。他们至少是3个女儿的父母。他去世于1349年在英国爾諾維其享年57岁，埋葬在英国爾諾維其。

historicEvents.title: Famine Strikes Europe
historicEvents.description: A famine caused by cold winters and wet summers across Europe caused millions to die due to starvation. Desperation from hunger caused high levels of crime, stampedes in bread lines in London, infanticide, and even cannibalism throughout Europe.

historicEvents.title: First War of Scottish Independence
historicEvents.description: The First War of Scottish Independence began after England invaded Scotland in 1296. The Treaty of Edinburgh was signed in 1328 which declared peace between the two kingdoms and brought the war to an end.

historicEvents.title: The Hundred Years' War
historicEvents.description: The Hundred Years' War between France and England was largely due to the question of legitimate succession to the French crown.

en.lifeSummary: When John Wrenbury was born in 1292, in Wrenbury, Cheshire, England, United Kingdom, his father, John Wrenbury, was 20 and his mother, Emma, was 23. He married Johanna de Wrenbury about 1317, in Wrenbury, Cheshire, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 3 daughters. He died in 1349, in Northwich, Cheshire, England, at the age of 57, and was buried in Northwich, Cheshire, England.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque John Wrenbury est né en 1292, à Wrenbury, Cheshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, John Wrenbury, avait 20 ans et sa mère, Emma, avait 23 ans. Il a épousé Johanna de Wrenbury environ 1317, à Wrenbury, Cheshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 3 filles. Il est décédé en 1349, à Northwich, Cheshire, Angleterre, à l’âge de 57 ans, et a été enterré à Northwich, Cheshire, Angleterre.

de.lifeSummary: Als John Wrenbury 1292 in Wrenbury, Cheshire, England, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war sein Vater John Wrenbury 20 und seine Mutter Emma 23. Er hat um 1317 in Wrenbury, Cheshire, England, United Kingdom Johanna de Wrenbury geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 3 Töchter. Er starb 1349 im Alter von 57 Jahren in Northwich, Cheshire, England und wurde in Northwich, Cheshire, England begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando John Wrenbury è nato il nel 1292 nel Wrenbury, Cheshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, il suo padre, John Wrenbury, aveva 20 anni e il suo madre, Emma, aveva 23 anni. Lui sposato Johanna de Wrenbury circa 1317, nel Wrenbury, Cheshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 3 figlie. Morì nel 1349, nel Northwich, Cheshire, England, all'età di 57 anni, e fu sepolto a Northwich, Cheshire, England.

ja.lifeSummary: John Wrenburyが1292年にイギリスイギリスチェシュアイアウレンブリーで生まれた時，父John Wrenburyは20歳，母Emmaは23歳であった。約1317年にイギリスイギリスチェシュアイアウレンブリーでJohanna de Wrenburyと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも3人の娘の親であった。彼は1349年にイギリスチェシュアイアノースウィチで57歳で死去し，イギリスチェシュアイアノースウィチにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: John Wrenbury(이)가 1292년 영국 잉글랜드 체실르 런버이에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 John Wrenbury(은)는 20세였고, 그의 어머니 Emma(은)는 23세였다. 그는 대략 1317년 영국 잉글랜드 체실르 런버이에서 Johanna de Wrenbury(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 세 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1349년 영국 체실르 노르스위치에서 57세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 체실르 노르스위치에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando John Wrenbury nasceu em 1292, em Wrenbury, Cheshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, seu pai, John Wrenbury, tinha 20 anos e sua mãe, Emma, tinha 23 anos. Ele casou-se com Johanna de Wrenbury aproximadamente 1317, em Wrenbury, Cheshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 3 filhas. Ele faleceu em 1349, em Northwich, Cheshire, Inglaterra, com 57 anos, e foi sepultado em Northwich, Cheshire, Inglaterra.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда John Wrenbury родился в 1292 г. в местности ренбури, чешир, Англия, Великобритания, его отцу по имени John Wrenbury было 20 лет, а матери, которую звали Emma, 23. Он женился на женщине по имени Johanna de Wrenbury около 1317 г. в местности ренбури, чешир, Англия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 3 дочери. Он умер в 1349 г. в местности нортвич, чешир, Англия в возрасте 57 лет и был похоронен в местности нортвич, чешир, Англия.

sm.from 1330 to 1350: mai le 1330 e o'o I le 1350

es.lifeSummary: Cuando John Wrenbury nació en 1292, en Wrenbury, Cheshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, su papá, John Wrenbury, tenía 20 años y su mamá, Emma, tenía 23 años. Se casó con Johanna de Wrenbury aproximadamente 1317, en Wrenbury, Cheshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 3 hijas. Murió en 1349, en Northwich, Cheshire, Inglaterra, a la edad de 57 años, y fue sepultado en Northwich, Cheshire, Inglaterra.
